steps.title: Identify the source and persistence
steps.content: The passage emphasizes that Sumerian civilization produced many concepts that persist into present-day civilizations, with the seven-day week in the Sumerian Epic of Gilgamesh as proof. The key is that Sumeria is the origin point of concepts we still use today.

steps.title: Choose the word for origination
steps.content: Introduced means “presented for the first time,” which exactly describes Sumeria originating concepts that persist into modern times. Transformed describes changing something already established, inherited reverses the flow (Sumeria is the source, not receiver), and overlooked contradicts the passage's emphasis on these concepts' ongoing importance. That matches choice B — B is correct.
